body_txt: Clothes make a man in Fictionland too. Many tropes are related to how a character's personality is shorthand coded into their wardrobe. In case of uniformed environments, Custom Uniforms often take the form of this. Especially notable are major changes in personal fashion, which are often related to major mental makeovers. Sister Trope of Art Reflects Personality (an artist's work shows what's going on in their head and/or heart).
